title: pronephrium nudatum
intro: Pronephrium nudatum, also known as the Naked Pronephrium, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Mariaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions, including eczema and acne. Pronephrium nudatum can be prepared for use in herbal medicine through decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
